titleStmt.title: SII 8.282: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 282. (A.R. No. 13 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉu mahaāmaṇḍalīśvara ṉ A rirāyavibhā ṭaṉ bhā ṣaikkut tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyirakaṇṭaṉ pūrvvapaccima dakṣaṇa sa
mudrā tivati śrīvīrapokkaṇauṭaiyar kumārar śrīvīrakampaṇauṭaiyar prithivirājya (ya)m paṇṇāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 2 100 9 10 5
lmel cellāniṉṟa paritāpivaruṣattu Āṭimātam 10 4 tiyati śrāvaṇa śuddhaThese two words appear to have been engraved here by mistake instead of after the date in l. 3. śrīmahaā pratāni comaiyateṇṇāyakkar kuṭutta paṭṭai
yappaṭi śrāvaṇaśuddhae kādaśi yu Ātivāram vaṭakarai virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu brahma teyam tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa
tirucciṟṟampalaccaturvve timaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūruṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkku Aṅgaraṅgabhogam Amutupaṭikku paritāpi varuṣam Āṭimā
tam mutalukkuc certta poṉ muṉṉūṟṟukkuc celavāka Uḷḷūr nāyaṉmār pūcai tiruvārātaṉam tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa
m bha ṭṭakaḷaiṟaiyili paḷḷiccantam Uṭpaṭṭa pala sarvva mānnya m nīṅkalāka cuṅkam Ubh Aiyamāṟkam Iṭaittuṟai cek
kukkaṭamai taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam kīḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum melnokkiṉa maramum Iraippuṉcey nattam nattappuṉ
cey Uṭpaṭṭa Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai cītu r Ellaikku meṟkku melpāṟ kellai Ukaḷūr Ellaikku kiḻakku
m teṉpāṟkellai kiḻmuttūr Aticūtamaṅkalattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nivāvāṟṟukku
teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey puṉpayir Uṭpaṭa viṭṭa
coḻamaṇṭalam Irācātarācavaḷanāṭṭu viṭṭa paṟṟu Attiyūr Ūr Oṉṟukku po
ṉ muṉṉūṟu Ippoṉ muṉṉūṟum sarvva mānnya māka cantrā tittavaraiyum ce
llak kuṭuttom kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷkai .
Digital edition of SII 8.282 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
